layout_and_spacing.container: Mobile-first approach. Desktop view should constrain the main app content to max-w-lg centered to mimic a premium mobile experience.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous padding (p-5 or p-6) inside cards. gap-6 between feed items.
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid border-border (#27272A) to separate true black layers without relying on shadows.

bottom_navigation.description: Fixed at the bottom of the screen with a glassmorphism effect over true black.
bottom_navigation.classes: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-lg mx-auto bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-zinc-800 pb-safe pt-3 px-6 flex justify-around items-center z-50

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF5A00] text-black font-bold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#E65000] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 border border-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors

post_card.classes: bg-[#09090B] border border-zinc-900 rounded-3xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-4 mb-4
post_card.elements: Header with avatar, #handle, timestamp, Tier badge. Content (text/media). Tags chips. Anonymous like count.

tier_badges.public: bg-zinc-800/50 text-zinc-300 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-md font-medium
tier_badges.followers: bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-500 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-md font-medium
tier_badges.inner_circle: bg-[#FF5A00]/10 text-[#FF5A00] border border-[#FF5A00]/20 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-md font-medium

tags.classes: inline-flex bg-zinc-900 text-zinc-400 text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full lowercase

profile.header_classes: flex flex-col items-center pt-8 pb-4 border-b border-zinc-900
profile.elements: Large avatar, #handle, 150-char bio, links section, and a 'Shop' placeholder.
profile.tabs: Feed, Wall, Audio, Boards, Pinned (Maximum 3 pinned posts).

features.feed: Chronological only, no algorithms. Sticky top toggle for 'Words' vs 'Gallery'.
features.posting: Tier selector mandatory. Tags input creates chips on space or comma (max 10, single words lowercase).
features.follow_system: Open or approval-required modes. Inner Circle is invite-only. Private metrics (no public follower counts, likes are anonymous).
features.messaging: Tier 1: No DMs. Tier 2: Optional DMs toggle. Tier 3: DMs always open.
features.safety: Three-strike system, block, mute, restrict. DOB required at signup to enforce minor safety rules.
features.comfort_zone: Settings panel for NSFW toggle (off by default) and AI label toggle.
features.wall_and_boards: Wall defaults to owner only, configurable. Discussion Boards available on profile for all 3 tiers.
features.search: # handle search only. Account required to search.

feed_placeholders.description: Minimalist dark architecture for placeholder posts
Abstract dark geometry for placeholder posts

instructions_to_main_agent: IMPORTANT: Write all React code in JavaScript (.js/.jsx). Do not use TypeScript.
Ensure all interactive and key informational elements have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='post-like-button', data-testid='tier-selector').
Use Shadcn UI components but strip the default look to match the true black, minimal premium aesthetic.
Apply the E1 anti-default font rule: Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body. Add these to the global CSS or font configuration.
Implement the UI mimicking a mobile app in the browser: absolute center max-w-lg container with hidden scrollbars.
Ensure handles always use # instead of @.
Create mocked contexts or state to demonstrate the visibility of tiers and chronological feed switching.
